================= REPORT SAVE =================

[CCSDS HEADER]
MsgId      : 0x0825
Seq        : 0xC000
Len        : 0x0215
TimeCode   : 00 0F 48 1A B2 16
Padding    : 0x00000000

[REPORT BODY]
Reflected MID  : 0x1875
Reflected CC   : 0x0A
RetType        : 0x00
RetCode        : 0
RetValSize     : 36

================= PARSED BY MID/CC =================
ReflectedMID : 0x1875
ReflectedCC  : 0x0A
PayloadLen   : 36

[EPS Query Report]
source     : 4
data_id    : 1
arg0       : 0
arg1       : 0
sequence   : 0
offset     : 0
total_size : 24
chunk_size : 24

[EPS Power IF Status]
ch_idx     : 16
mode       : 1
on_cnt     : 0
off_cnt    : 0
cur_lu_lim : 2500
cur_lim    : 2500
voltage    : 5017
current    : 1
latchup    : 0
name       : ch16

[PAYLOAD HEX]
04 01 00 00 00 00 00 00 18 00 18 00 10 01 00 00 
00 00 C4 09 C4 09 99 13 01 00 00 00 63 68 31 36 
00 00 00 00 

[RETURN VALUE]
04 01 00 00 00 00 00 00 18 00 18 00 10 01 00 00 
00 00 C4 09 C4 09 99 13 01 00 00 00 63 68 31 36 
00 00 00 00 

[BINARY DATA]
